languages.text: {n}Аристократка морщится словно от зубной боли.{/n} "Предположим. В конце концов, ты, похоже, знаешь, что делаешь".
{n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."
languages.original_text: {n}Аристократка морщится словно от зубной боли.{/n} "Предположим. В конце концов, ты, похоже, знаешь, что делаешь".

traits.locale_text: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."
{n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."
{n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."

languages.text: {n}La expresión de la noble se vuelve incómoda, como si le dolieran las muelas.{/n} «Supongo que sí. Usted sabe lo que hacer mejor que nadie».
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}La expresión de la noble se vuelve incómoda, como si le dolieran las muelas.{/n} «Supongo que sí. Usted sabe lo que hacer mejor que nadie».

languages.text: {n}这位贵族女子的脸上浮现出痛苦的神色，仿佛牙痛发作一般。{/n}“也罢。毕竟，你看起来很清楚自己在做什么。”
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}这位贵族女子的脸上浮现出痛苦的神色，仿佛牙痛发作一般。{/n}“也罢。毕竟，你看起来很清楚自己在做什么。”

languages.text: {n}L'expression de l'aristocrate se fait dolente, comme si elle souffrait d'une rage de dents.{/n} « Si vous le dites. Après tout, vous semblez savoir ce que vous faites. »
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'expression de l'aristocrate se fait dolente, comme si elle souffrait d'une rage de dents.{/n} « Si vous le dites. Après tout, vous semblez savoir ce que vous faites. »

languages.text: {n}Soylunun yüz ifadesi, sanki diş ağrısı çekiyormuş gibi acı verici bir hâl alıyor.{/n} "Sanırım. Sonuçta ne yaptığınızı biliyor gibisiniz."
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Soylunun yüz ifadesi, sanki diş ağrısı çekiyormuş gibi acı verici bir hâl alıyor.{/n} "Sanırım. Sonuçta ne yaptığınızı biliyor gibisiniz."

languages.text: {n}Die Adelige verzieht das Gesicht, als hätte sie Zahnschmerzen.{/n} "Vermutlich. Immerhin scheint Ihr zu wissen, was Ihr tut."
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Adelige verzieht das Gesicht, als hätte sie Zahnschmerzen.{/n} "Vermutlich. Immerhin scheint Ihr zu wissen, was Ihr tut."

languages.text: {n}貴婦人の表情が、まるで歯痛にでも苦しむかのように歪む。{/n}「そうね。結局のところ、あなたは自分のしていることを分かっているようだし。」
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."
